data.title: RED test: gate-2a-reversal-check.sh behavioral tests
data.description:
Create tests/scripts/test-gate-2a-reversal-check.sh with behavioral bash tests. Each test creates a temp git repo with controlled history, calls the script, asserts on stdout JSON and exit code.

Tests:
1. test_detects_reversal — commit change, propose fix that undoes it -> triggered:true
2. test_no_reversal — normal fix -> triggered:false
3. test_revert_of_revert — commit, revert, revert-of-revert -> NOT triggered, evidence field mentions revert-of-revert
4. test_intent_aligned_suppression — pass --intent-aligned flag -> triggered:false regardless
5. test_emits_gate_signal_json — output has gate_id "2a", signal_type "primary"
6. test_no_git_history — file with no prior commits -> triggered:false (no evidence)
7. test_outside_git_repo — call from non-git dir -> graceful exit 0, triggered:false
8. test_multi_file_partial_reversal — 2 files, only one reversed -> triggered:true (any reversal triggers)

Script interface: accepts file paths as positional args, --intent-aligned flag. Reads working tree diff via git diff on those files. Compares against git log --oneline -20.

.test-index entry: plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2a-reversal-check.sh: tests/scripts/test-gate-2a-reversal-check.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-gate-2a-reversal-check.sh
- [ ] At least 8 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' tests/scripts/test-gate-2a-reversal-check.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] Tests create temp git repos (behavioral)
  Verify: grep -q 'git init' tests/scripts/test-gate-2a-reversal-check.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry exists
  Verify: grep -q 'gate-2a-reversal-check' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
